raw_text:
Secured by Collateral Loan
Details URL: https://www.inecobank.am/en/Individual/consumer-loans/secured-consumer-loan
[Section: Secured by Collateral Loan]
Apply and get loans collateralized by movable or immovable property without any proof of Income.
[Section: Secured Loan without any proof of income]
Apply Inecobank and get loans secured by movable or immovable property with a simplified procedure. The loan can be formed without proof of income.
[Section: Simple and Fast]
Get a consumer loan secured by movable or immovable property in Inecobank’s branches with a simplified procedure. Apply for a loan and your loan application will be reviewed in the shortest time possible, without any application fees.
Updated as of 12.03.2026 15:25
